title: On A Perfumed Lady
content:
You say you're sweet: how should we know
Whether that you be sweet or no?
From powders and perfumes keep free;
Then we shall smell how sweet you be!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "On A Perfumed Lady"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
